title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that creates knowledge graphs from code repositories without using RAG, enabling more accurate and token-efficient code understanding. It addresses memory and context limitations in code analysis by extracting and storing information from large codebases in structured graph format.
